calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Management Of Trust Property And Distributiion To Mr. Jones
Off Calendar Jul-21-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Burmeister for Quenn Neal.

The Court noted that Mr. Jones was not present. Mr. Burmeister stated that they located Mr. Jones in May 2010, that it appeared that Mr. Jones was in a more steady residence, that they paid Mr. Jones $1,500.00 per month starting in June, that his Client rented out three units, that they were collecting $7,300.00 per month and that his Client was trying to renovate the upstairs unit with the possibility of moving Mr. Jones into one of the units. In addition, Mr. Burmeister stated that Mr. Jones seems satisfied with the payment, that he has not spoken to Mr. Jones about the dental work, that he has heard no complaints and that he believed Ms. Queen hired a bookkeeper. The Court stated that perhaps Mr. Jones needed assistance with setting up an appointment with a Dentist and suggested assistance from a Case Manager. The matter was taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-22-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Burmeister for Queen Neal. George Jones (Son) in Propria Persona.

Mr. Jones stated that he was trying to obtain Counsel, that he opposed the will and his Grandmother's trust and that he was not being provided with any documents or information. The Court informed Mr. Jones that the time to challenge the will had expired, that the will sets up a trust for him and that the question was who was going to be appointed to handle the trust. Mr. Burmeister stated that he would like to be able get things wrapped up so that Mr. Jones could move into the upstairs unit and start receiving income. Mr. Jones provided a current address and stated that he needed dental work and eye glasses. Mr. Jones was directed to provide an estimate to Mr. Burmeister. The accounting was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-22-2009 Continued To Jan-05-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Burmeister for and with Queen Neal (Executor).

The Court noted that Mr. Jones was not present. Mr. Burmeister stated that only one of the units was section 8, that all three units were now rented and that they now have written leases for two of the units. In addition, he stated that cash was collected for some of the rent, that the cash was used to pay the Contractor for the renovations, that $1,400.00 was deposited for October and November, and that he would provide receipts. Furthermore, Counsel stated that is was the Decedent's intention to have the Personal Representative appointed as the Trustee, that Ms. Neal was a residual Beneficiary, that there was no petition by anyone and no opposition by anyone. The Court directed Counsel to file the receipts and took the matter under submission.

Judge Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-07-2009 Continued To Oct-28-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

The Court noted that Mr. Jones was not present. Mr. Burmeister requested a continuance stating that he filed a supplemental account and that he was still responding to the Examiner's notes. The matter was continued to October 28, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Burmeister is to notify Mr. Jones of the new hearing date.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Carl Sauceda, CSR#2031. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-18-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Robert Burmeister appearing for petitioner. George Jones is in court. His attorney Mr. Gross is not in court. Court found the objection to the appointment is ill-found. Mr. Jones is protected under the Will. Court is granting the petition. Order signed.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: F. Smith.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-03-2007 Continued To Apr-18-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Robert Burmeister appearing for petitioner Queen Neal. Leonard Gross appearing for and with heir/objector George Jones. Objection filed. Mr. Gross argued that there is a conflict with the petitioner. He wants to petition for appointment. Court does not see any conflict but he is continuing this matter to 4/18 at 10:00am. Mr. Burmeister requested for a copy of the objection and he received a copy from Mr. Gross.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell CSR# 2542. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: F. Smith.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-20-2007 Continued To Apr-03-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Bermeister, Jr. (Counsel for Queen Neal, Petitioner); George Jones (putative beneficiary, in pro per).

At the outset, the Court excused further publication of the Notice of the Petition to Administer Estate. After further discussion with Mr. Bermeister, the Court granted the Petition, whereupon Mr. Brown orally objected to the same. After presentation by Mr. Brown and an affirmative representation by him that he was in the process of securing legal counsel to present a will contest, the Court rescinded its earlier ruling and continued the matter to April 3, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 by which time Mr. Brown must have his will contest on file else the Petition by Ms. Neal will be granted.

Judicial Office: Dorothy L. McMath, Commissioner; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722; Bailiff: Deputy Rigo Guitron; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: None.
